2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.1.18 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v0.1.18" was found for current release 0.1.18. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json5/items/tab2/items/regionev" attribute "label" uses key "Region" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#129] "[iobroker-bot] Drop Node.js 20 support (End of Life)"](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/issues/129)

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20.0.0' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
